title: OPERATION SAUCER #4 [Operação Prato]  reports n.031 to n.040 [1977]

SHAPE: Undefined 07 APPARENT SIZE: 5 cm 08. MOVEMENT: Straight trajectory, in the Southwest / Northwest direction. 09. SPEED: average (500 Km / h) 10. […]
text_preview:
- 01- REG. n. 031

- 02. PLACE: COLARES-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 07 Nov 77 – at 05:20 hours

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Light yellow, emitting blue flashes.

- 06. SHAPE: Undefined

- 07 APPARENT SIZE: 5 cm

- 08. MOVEMENT: Straight trajectory, in the Southwest / Northwest direction.

- 09. SPEED: average (500 Km / h)

- 10. ALTITUDE: 1,200m (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 1,500m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): A2 / I COMAR team

- 13. NOTE: Total absence of noise.

- 14. APPENDIX: Copy of 03 (three) photographs.

- 01. REG. n. 032

- 02. PLACE: COLARES-PA

- 03 DATE / TIME: 08
summary: Operação Prato reports 031–040: ten luminous-body sightings in Nov 1977 in Pará; objects mostly undefined shape making supersonic passes near Colares Island and Mosqueiro.
